_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: HaikalDev Portfolio
author: me@haikaldev.my.id
description: Pterodactyl Egg for HaikalDev Portfolio (React/Vite Frontend + Express Backend) featuring automatic git pull, dependency checks, and production assets building.
startup: if [ ! -d .git ]; then echo "[HaikalDev] Cloning..." && git clone -b "${GIT_BRANCH:-master}" "${GIT_REPO}" .; else echo "[HaikalDev] Pulling..." && git pull origin "${GIT_BRANCH:-master}"; fi; chmod +x run.sh && ./run.sh

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash

# =============================================================
# HaikalDev Portfolio -- Pterodactyl Installation Script
# Installs portable Node.js 20 into the server directory
# =============================================================

set -e
cd /mnt/user-data/volumes/$P_SERVER_UUID

echo "[HaikalDev] Memulai instalasi Node.js 20 portable..."

NODE_VER="v20.11.0"
NODE_DIR="node-${NODE_VER}-linux-x64"
NODE_TAR="${NODE_DIR}.tar.xz"

if [ ! -d "node" ]; then
    echo "[HaikalDev] Downloading Node.js ${NODE_VER}..."
    apk add --no-cache curl tar xz git
    curl -LsO "https://nodejs.org/dist/${NODE_VER}/${NODE_TAR}"
    echo "[HaikalDev] Extracting Node.js..."
    tar -xf "${NODE_TAR}"
    mv "${NODE_DIR}" node
    rm "${NODE_TAR}"
    echo "[HaikalDev] Node.js portable installed successfully in ./node"
else
    echo "[HaikalDev] Node.js portable already exists."
fi

echo "[HaikalDev] Setup completed!"

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: URL Repository GitHub untuk portofolio ini.

variables.description: Branch target untuk proses Git Pull.

variables.name: Backend Port
variables.description: Port untuk Express API Server (harus di-allocate pada server).

variables.name: Vite Backend API Base
variables.description: URL Backend API (misal: http://IP_KAMU:3001/api). Digunakan oleh frontend saat build.
